name: set_zone_away_configuration
description: Updates the away mode configuration for a specific heating zone. Allows customization of how the heating system behaves when the home is unoccupied, including setting minimum away temperatures and controlling early start pre-heating levels (OFF, ECO, MEDIUM, or COMFORT).

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home installation

minimum_away_temperature.description: The minimum temperature in Celsius to maintain when the home is unoccupied (away mode)

preheating_level.description: The early start pre-heating level when away: OFF (disabled), ECO (energy-saving pre-heat), MEDIUM (balanced pre-heat), or COMFORT (maximum pre-heat comfort)

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone to configure

zone_type.description: The type of zone (typically 'HEATING' for heating zones)
